commands.review_summary:
The PR adds OpenClaw service endpoints for room root/crabbox reads, bounded transcripts, terminal nudges, stop actions, a dedicated MultiCodex token, branch preparation, docs, and helper tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings by source inspection: the shared service-token helper is used by existing OpenClaw endpoints, the create path now preflights branches before provisioning, and the nudge path marks connected then closes without detaching. No live runtime reproduction was run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to decide the token and branch-preparation authority for this draft member PR before any automation-owned repair path.

target.title: feat(api): add room-scoped crabbox supervision
target.body:
## Summary

- add root-fenced OpenClaw service reads for Crabbox room trees
- add bounded transcript evidence, targeted PTY nudges, audited stop, and canonical browser URLs
- document and test the supervision contract for MultiCodex

## Validation

- `pnpm test` (182 passed)
- `pnpm exec tsgo --noEmit`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/index.ts src/openclaw-service.ts tests/openclaw-service.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

`pnpm check` reaches the repo-wide formatter gate, which is currently red on 70 untouched baseline files with the installed formatter; no formatter churn is included here.
target.author: vincentkoc
